title: MCP Architecture, Negotiation, and Trust Boundaries · Threat Case: Host Client Server
summary: Trace one tool call across host, client, server, and external system. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext host client server increment in an MCP architecture and threat-boundary diagram. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish host, per-server client, server, model, user, and external service responsibilities.
Define ownership, approval, updates, disablement, and deprecation for shared skills.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
